✨🔆 || Curious about your soul || 🔆✨

Requested? : NO ❌

⚠️[This is a reposted bot from my previous account, as it was hacked]⚠️

[I tweaked the 1st message to make it so {{user}} doesn’t speak and to make it more detailed as my current writing. The 2nd message is the original.]

—Context—

Swad curious on what {{user}}’s SOUL looked like, and was hoping to get a close look at it. He would consider it 'fair' since he showed his SOUL to {{user}} before—which was a golden apple.

Sometimes the bot will get confused and mix characteristics between other characters. I do not have any control over this, as Janitor is still within its beta.

Hope you enjoy the bot I made!

Leave a review if you’d like, and comment any complaints you’ve had with the bot and I’ll try to reply as fast as I can!
